Along Came Polly (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $88,073,507Details
International Box Office $84,970,903
Worldwide Box Office $173,044,410
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,721,185 (31.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$42,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,984 opening theaters/3,052 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $169,623,047

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 16th, 2004 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: January 22nd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 8th, 2004 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, language, crude humor and some drug references.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Infidelity, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Jersey Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
